# NIP-54 Reference Card

### REFERENCE_CARD
NIP-54 defines `kind:30818` for wiki articles and `kind:30819` for wiki redirects. Required tags: `d` (normalized, lowercase). Optional tags: `title`, `summary`, `a`, `e`. Filter patterns: `d` tag for article identification. JSON example: `{"content": "A wiki is a hypertext publication collaboratively edited and managed by its own audience.", "tags": [["d", "wiki"], ["title", "Wiki"]]}`. Wikilinks: `[[Target Page]]`, `[[target page|see this]]`, `[[日本語 Topic|Japanese Topic]]`.
